Description:
Model
Brand: DIYPC
Model: ARGB-N5-BK


Details
Type: ATX case
Color: Black
Case Material: Steel / Tempered Glass
With Power Supply: No
Power Supply Mounted: Bottom
Motherboard Compatibility: ATX / E-ATX / Micro ATX / Mini-ITX
Side Panel: 2 x Sides Tempered Glass Panel
LED: ARGB


Expansion
Internal 3.5" Drive Bays: 2
Expansion Slots: 7


Front Panel Ports
Front Ports: 2 x USB 3.0 / 1 x Type C / Audio In & Out (HD)


Cooling System
Fan Options: Top: 3 x 120mm fan (Optional) 

Bottom: 3 x 120mm fan (Optional)

MB Side: 2 x 120mm ARGB Reverse Blade PWM Fan (pre-installed)

Rear: 1 x 120mm ARGB PWM Fan (pre-installed)
Pre-installed Fans: Rear - 1 x 120mm / Side - 2 x 120mm
Radiator Options: Top support up to 360mm ,rear x 120mm liquid cooler


Dimensions & Weight
Max GPU Length: 420 mm
Max CPU Cooler Height: 180 mm
Max PSU Length: 200 mm
Dimensions: 17.8" x 9.53" x 18"


Additional Info
Features: Features	DIYPC ARGB-N5-BK is a panoramic ATX case with a 270° full view of your masterpiece for 
building high-performance system. It has front and side tempered glass panel, w/top mesh
design allow optimized air flow. The case’s design has bigger interior space to accommodate and
improve cooling performance (can support up to 425mm x GPU and 360mm radiator x top). 
It supports up to 200mm long full ATX power supply to run the most power hungry system. 

Advanced cable management design – routing the main cable is easy and quick through a hidden channel.
There is a large space behind the motherboard for all cables, making the case a clean and beautiful look. 
2 ways to control ARGB Fan Lighting: Either by Manual ARGB LED Button on Top I/O Panel; or if your 
motherboard has 5v addressable connector, this case has ARGB 5V/3 pin header ready to SYNC w/your 
motherboard to control ARGB lighting. ARGB HUB controller with PWM is included.

Water cooling ready – Top support 360mm , rear support 1 x 120mm radiator

Advanced bottom-mounted power supply design

Top mounted IO ports - 2 x USB 3.0 / 1 x Type C for up-to-date high speed data transfer

9 fans capability (2 x 120mm ARGB reverse blade  PWM fan x side, 1 x 120mm ARGB PWM
                            fan x rear pre-installed)  provide great cooling and gaming performance

Magnetic dust filter at top - easy clean

Support up to 180mm CPU cooler

Support up to 425mm VGA card


Additional Information
First Listed on Newegg: April 17, 2025
Label: Chasis DIYPC ARGB-N5-BK Black
